title: R & R Roofing
address: 6898 Lesley Crescent, Powell River, BC V8A 5K2
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Norma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKoLUAXFe63qDIfh4Py74nd7I-v0NM6otRpJR1XrJo1-QwtIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I became a landlord a couple of years ago and have had several roofs that needed immediate attention.  Calling all the contractors in the book resulted in one response from a roofer I used twice with mixed results.  Rick and Rhonda, however, called back immediately with a surprisingly easy and pleasant experience.   It was a little too late in the season for them to come right away (I called in September), but Rick came out and did a patch job on the one roof of real concern so it held out through the wild snow weather of last year..   In the spring, they called back, arranged a time, and even did a little extra side job on another building.  They also put up with my fears about water pipes and driving etc with no complaints.  They left an exceptionally clean work site and did it all  ahead of schedule at a great price.\nI recommend this company to anyone needing a roof--at least they will respond and at best you will be very happy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charles “Prospero246” Macelli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIOsqeWJCk6IEbwcRU0_K9ikGcDW8pboHTm_6_cvnopqUIT860=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These guys were professional and efficient.
